history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with curly dark hair and a mustache is sitting on a silver chair in front of a convenience store. He is wearing a black t-shirt with a small white logo on the left side of his chest and dark gray shorts. A silver chain is visible around his neck. He is looking directly at the camera with a slight smile. Behind him, to the left, is the interior of a convenience store with shelves stocked with various products. To the right, there are two young women sitting at a metal table, both looking at their phones. Further to the right, a man in an orange safety vest is standing. The lighting is somewhat dim, suggesting it might be evening or the interior of the store is not brightly lit. The overall color palette consists of muted tones with pops of yellow and blue from the store's signage. Text overlays in white and yellow are present on the left side of the image, reading "YEN PANCEN NGENE IKI TAKDIRE". The mood is casual and relaxed. The image is framed with a video player interface at the bottom, showing playback controls.
